title: Section 57
content: (1) Nothing in the 1[Companies Act, 1956 (1 of 1956)] shall apply to the Bank and the Bank shall not be placed in liquidation save by order of the 2[Central Government] and in such manner as 3[it may direct]. 4* * * * *
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 19 of 1957, s. 5, for "Indian Companies Act, 1913 (7 of 1913)" (w.e.f. 8-6-1957). 2. Subs. by the M.O. 1937, for "G.G. in C.". 3. Subs. by ibid., for "he may direct". 4. Sub-section (2) omitted by Act 62 of 1948, s. 7 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 1-1-1949).
